testcase.name: test_delete_path_traversal_prevention

failure.message: AssertionError: Path traversal should be blocked, got 404 assert 404 == 400 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_upload_api.py:297: in test_delete_path_traversal_prevention assert response.status_code == 400, f"Path traversal should be blocked, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Path traversal should be blocked, got 404 E assert 404 == 400 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_with_slash_in_filename

failure.message: AssertionError: Slash in filename should be blocked, got 404 assert 404 == 400 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_upload_api.py:303: in test_delete_with_slash_in_filename assert response.status_code == 400, f"Slash in filename should be blocked, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Slash in filename should be blocked, got 404 E assert 404 == 400 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
